title: Birthdays
questions: What's the best and worst birthday you've ever had?
Do you know how people celebrate birthdays in other countries?
What's the best birthday present you've ever been given?
What present would you like for your next birthday?
Do you think everyone should have a holiday from school or work on their birthday?
In English people wish those whose birthday it is "many happy returns". What do you think this means?
What do you do on people's birthdays in your country that you think doesn't happen in other countries?
Do you know of any big events that happened on your birthday?
Do you think birthdays have become too commercial?
What did you do on your last birthday?
Do your family and friends always remember your birthday?
What are the milestone birthdays in your country?
Do you think old people like birthdays?
Do you think you were born at a good time of the year?
Do you sing the song "Happy Birthday" in your country?
Would you like to live to celebrate your hundredth birthday?
What happy memories do you have of your birthday parties?
What is a "birthday suit" and why is it called so?
